name: closure_loses_l2_table_page
code:
proof fn phi_1_closure_loses_l2_table_page(
    old_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    new_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    target_l1_p: PageMapPtr,
    target_l2_p: PageMapPtr,
)
    requires
        target_l1_p != target_l2_p,
        old_closure.contains(target_l1_p),
        old_closure.contains(target_l2_p),
        new_closure =~= old_closure.remove(target_l1_p),
    ensures
        !new_closure.contains(target_l2_p),
{
}
reason: Removing an L2 entry should only evict the L1 page from the closure, not the L2 table page itself

name: l1_page_still_in_closure
code:
proof fn phi_2_l1_page_still_in_closure(
    old_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    new_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    target_l1_p: PageMapPtr,
)
    requires
        old_closure.contains(target_l1_p),
        new_closure =~= old_closure.remove(target_l1_p),
    ensures
        new_closure.contains(target_l1_p),
{
}
reason: After removal the L1 page must not remain in the page closure or the page table leaks a page frame

name: mapping_4k_gains_entry
code:
proof fn phi_3_mapping_4k_gains_entry(
    old_mapping_4k: Map<VAddr, MapEntry>,
    new_mapping_4k: Map<VAddr, MapEntry>,
    va: VAddr,
)
    requires
        new_mapping_4k =~= old_mapping_4k,
        !old_mapping_4k.dom().contains(va),
    ensures
        new_mapping_4k.dom().contains(va),
{
}
reason: Removing an L2 entry must never introduce a new 4K mapping that did not previously exist

name: mapping_2m_loses_entry
code:
proof fn phi_4_mapping_2m_loses_entry(
    old_mapping_2m: Map<VAddr, MapEntry>,
    new_mapping_2m: Map<VAddr, MapEntry>,
    va: VAddr,
)
    requires
        new_mapping_2m == old_mapping_2m,
        old_mapping_2m.dom().contains(va),
    ensures
        !new_mapping_2m.dom().contains(va),
{
}
reason: Removing an L2-to-L1 link must not destroy any existing 2M large-page mappings

name: closure_gains_new_page
code:
proof fn phi_5_closure_gains_new_page(
    old_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    new_closure: Set<PagePtr>,
    target_l1_p: PageMapPtr,
    new_p: PageMapPtr,
)
    requires
        new_closure =~= old_closure.remove(target_l1_p),
        !old_closure.contains(new_p),
        new_p != target_l1_p,
    ensures
        new_closure.contains(new_p),
{
}
reason: A removal operation must never grow the page closure with pages that were not previously tracked
